board.race_name: GARRARD'S HORSE AND HOUND MAIDEN HT2
ALL NEWS AT TRACKSIDE.CO.NZ SPRINT PBD
INDIANA SIRE STAKES 2YO FILLIES PACE MS
WAIKATO FOXBRIDGE PLATE 22 AUG @ TE RAPA
COPRICE WORKING DOG FAMILY STAKES PBD

H:YKS:8:2026-07-09.comment: 5. TALL DARK TEQUILA has been racing well, filling a top-five position at her last four starts including a third most recently at this track over 1609m. Finds a nice race and will be a major force once more. 4. JORDANNA HANOVER finished seventh last start, beaten 16 metres at Pocono Downs over 1609m. Expect her to pose a serious challenge. 1. BRONX MIXER didn't do a bad job when fifth over 1609m at this track last time out. 6. SAMMY JO HANOVER is worth plenty of thought off a last-start win by 4.5 metres at this track over 1609m.

runners.name: JORDANNA HANOVER
runners.comment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 7th (Fr5) over 1609m at Pocono Downs, beaten 16 m by Ballast (1:52.00) in W6-8PM?FM on June 22 at $31.60. At the previous start 5th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track beaten 10 m by Time To Strike (1:55.20) in FNW15000L5 on June 12 at $3.50. Worth another chance. Leading player.

runners.name: TALL DARK TEQUILA
runners.comment: Fair performance when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second behind Real Fast at Pocono Downs over 1609m in a TSS?3YOF on June 20 at $1.90. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing third behind I'm A Lou Lou at this track over 1609m in a PARK?MGM-G3 on June 26 at $6.09. Has the ability to take this out.

runners.name: YOULLFINDOUT
runners.comment: Won three starts back at this track over 1609m FMW2BNM4PM on June 6. Last start 7th (Fr3) over 1609m at this track, beaten 15 m by Cheryls Shadow (1:52.40) in FNW15000L5 on June 26 at $7.84. Has the ability to take this out.

runners.name: BRONX MIXER
runners.comment: Last start 5th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track beaten 18 m by Nila Maree (1:53.40) in FNW10000L5 on June 19 at $40.26. Before that, 4th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track, beaten 16 m by Elusive (1:53.20) in FNW11251L5 on June 12 at $9.04. In the mix from the inside draw.

runners.name: THREECURTAINCALLS
runners.comment: Racing in great heart. Last start posted a big 8 m win (Fr1) at Pocono Downs (1:51.20) beating Please Be You in MNW12500L5 on June 29 at $4.70. In the mix to go back-to-back.

runners.name: SAMMY JO HANOVER
runners.comment: Last start won by 4.5 m as favourite (Fr3) at this track (1:56.20) beating Crystal Coast in FMW2BNM4PM on June 24 at $1.96. Sure to be thereabouts.

runners.name: ANNA LOVES BANANAS
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Fr5) over 1609m at Philadelphia beaten 4 m by Blood Moon (1:51.30) in MNW10000L5 on June 26 at $2.10. Two runs back 6th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track, beaten 24 m by Elusive (1:53.20) in FNW11251L5 on June 12 at $21.42. A top-three finish would surprise.

runners.name: STEPABOVETHEREST
runners.comment: Didn't do much at the last run, 6th (Fr8) over 1609m at Pocono Downs, beaten 15 m by Exceptionalism (1:52.30) in MNW6500L5 on June 29 at $19.20. Before that 7th (Fr2) over 1609m at Pocono Downs beaten 30 m by Sweetnikkilou (1:50.20) in MNW9500L5 on June 15 at $33.90. Can't tip based on recent efforts.

R:ABO:3:2026-07-09.comment: 1. CONSPIRACYTHEORIST started at $3.25 last time and ran below expectations, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths at this track over 1207m. Likely improver with strong prospects. 6. IN VRONSKY STYLE doesn't win very often but ran a strong race last time out over 1207m at this track, finishing second and beaten 2 lengths after being prominent at the turn. Likely improver with strong prospects. 7. MAIN DUDE stuck on well last start to finish third over 1207m at this track after showing good early speed. This is a nice race and can get the job done. 3. BRINSON missed the placings two runs back then didn't do any better last start when 12 lengths away in seventh over 1207m at this track. Has his share of talent and is a top-three prospect.

runners.name: IN VRONSKY STYLE
runners.comment: At the latest run held ground to the line 2nd of 7 at this track on June 24 over 1207m, 2 len behind Aaron's Spirit carrying 55.5kg at $4.75. The run before that 5th of 7 at this track on June 1 over 1006m, 6 len behind Finding Ways carrying 55.5kg at $30. Nice effort last time. Can go on with the job now.

runners.name: CONSPIRACYTHEORIST
runners.comment: At the latest run 5th of 7 at this track on June 24 over 1207m, 8 len behind Aaron's Spirit with 55.5kg at $3.25. The start before that 2nd of 8 at this track on June 3 over 1106m, nose behind Flying Tex carrying 55.5kg at $6.35. Can turn things around.

runners.name: HE LIKES WINNING
runners.comment: Most recently ran last of 7 at this track on June 24 over 1207m, 15 len behind Aaron's Spirit carrying 55.5kg at $5.80. The run before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 8 at this track on June 3 over 1106m, 2.75 len behind Flying Tex with 55.5kg at $3.90. Safely held last start but is capable of better.

runners.name: MAIN DUDE
runners.comment: Recent form sound. At the latest run raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 9 at this track on June 17 over 1207m, 1.3 len behind Call The Cavalry with 55.5kg at $15.80. The start before that settled back and ran on when 4th of 8 at this track on June 3 over 1106m, 3.5 len behind Flying Tex carrying 55.5kg at $7. Further improvement is anticipated.

runners.name: SHANKADOPOLOUS
runners.comment: Comes here off a 35-day let-up. At the latest run ran second last of 8 at this track on June 3 over 1106m, 9 len behind Flying Tex with 53kg at $14.45. The run before that ran second last of 7 at this track on May 20 over 1006m, 11 len behind Prints Money carrying 55.5kg at $25.45. Fully tested on his recent run.

runners.name: NOIWONTBACKDOWN
runners.comment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 6th of 8 at this track on June 3 over 1106m, 9 len behind Flying Tex carrying 55.5kg at $28.45. Second run from a spell 4th of 7 at this track on June 24 over 1207m, 6 len behind Aaron's Spirit carrying 55.5kg at $44.35. Might just find this a bit too tough.

runners.name: BRINSON
runners.comment: Most recently ran last of 7 at this track on July 1 over 1207m, 12 len behind Makena's Joy with 53.5kg at $25.75. Before that 5th of 9 at this track on June 17 over 1207m, 4 len behind Call The Cavalry carrying 55.5kg at $34. Has shown enough ability in the past to take this out.

G:SHE:5:2026-07-09.comment: 3. BUSTER BOURBSKI turned in a moderate run last time when eighth at Healesville over 300m behind Be A Shadow (17.20) in a Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minor placings. Can discover winning form. 7. SMILING LILY boasts a strong record this course with three wins and two minors from eight tries. Was out of placings last time (19.94) at Healesville in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 5 lengths. Looks one of the chances. 2. BONE SHAKER turned in a modest effort most recently when seventh at this track over 390m behind Ari Gold (22.97) in a Special conditions Veteran race. Cannot be left out. 1. WE ARE SOUTH has strong claims after a long-odds top-three finish last time out.

runners.name: HECTIC HARRY
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (22.93) over 390m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Looking to others.

runners.name: SMILING BEE
runners.comment: Showed brilliant pace early and gave a sight when a 4.5 lengths third over 390m this track in 22.44. More than capable and ready to find best form.

runners.name: BUSTER BOURBSKI
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (17.20) at Healesville in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 6 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from five starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

runners.name: SMILING LILY
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on July 5 over 350m at Healesville behind Son Of Rosie beaten 5 lengths (19.94). Has performed below expectations at her last couple but is capable of far better.

runners.name: BONE SHAKER
runners.comment: Last start finished 7th over 390m at this track beaten 12 lengths (22.97) behind Ari Gold in a Special conditions Veteran race on July 6. Key chance on best form.

runners.name: WE ARE SOUTH
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (22.79) over 390m at this track. Gets the rails draw this time. Deserves respect.

runners.name: JAICOS
runners.comment: Returns from a nine weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a seventh (26.66) over 450m at this track. Yet to win when resuming but has notched two places. Has ability and worth including.

runners.name: BLUES TRAIN
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 390m at this track. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

H:NFP:10:2026-07-09.comment: 1. BELLA DAYLE lines up for the first time. By Downbytheseaside and hails from the Jason Mcginnis stable. Has the benefit of a good draw. Sure to prove very hard to beat. 5. POSEFORMIKI is a likely improver after debuting with a solid third last time out over 1609m at this track. 3. MIRICAL is ready to improve after debuting with a respectable fifth last time out over 1609m at The Meadows. 7. DROP POCKET is at the track for the first time. By Monte Miki and hails from the Jeff Nisonger stable. Has to contend with a very wide draw. Capable of taking this out.

runners.name: MIRICAL
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly facing the starter for the second time. At debut 5th (Fr2) over 1609m at The Meadows, beaten 12 m by Thats Faith (1:59.30) in POPUP2YOF on June 26 at $21.70. Capable of a strong showing.

runners.name: BELLA DAYLE
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly by Downbytheseaside out of Roxy Lady on debut. Showed ability when she won at Northfield Park in a trial on June 25 over 1609m. Profiles nicely but betting will hold the key.

runners.name: POSEFORMIKI
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly lining up for the second time. At debut solid effort when 3rd (Fr2) over 1609m at this track beaten 30 m by Monte Be Good (1:57.10) in 2YO?NW1PM on July 1 at $4.70. Hard to fault on current form.

runners.name: FIREYLIPS
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly (Catch The Fire - Libspeak) making her debut. Finished fifth in a trial on June 18 at Northfield Park over 1609m. Might be better for this outing

runners.name: GOLD CRUSH
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly by Summa Cum Laude out of Major Crush on debut. Might be better for this outing

runners.name: WEST SIDE LUCK
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly lining up for the second time. At debut 5th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track beaten 50 m by Monte Be Good (1:57.10) in 2YO?NW1PM on July 1 at $46.80. Hard to make a case.

runners.name: ROSE RUN CARMINE
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly by Lather Up out of Private Performanc having her first start. Finished seventh in a trial on June 29 at Scioto Downs over 1609m. Respect any move in betting.

runners.name: SONG CELEBRITY
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly by Bit Of A Legend N out of Surf Song on debut. Finished third at Northfield Park in a trial on July 2 over 1609m. Prefer to see at the races before recommending.

runners.name: DROP POCKET
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly (Monte Miki - Corner Pocket) making her debut. Finished third at Scioto Downs in a trial on June 29 over 1609m. Respect any move in betting.

ref.race_name: GARRARD'S HORSE AND HOUND MAIDEN HT2

G:QST:2:2026-07-09.comment: 2. BYE BRUNETTE is a Carlin Wendt-trained newcomer by Superior Panama out of Black Mirage. Gets every chance from the inside draw. Market to provide the best guide to his chances. 8. ELITE CAVIAR comes off a moderate effort last start, finishing fourth at this track over 300m behind Enough Torque (17.16). Safe beginner but wide box to overcome and will need some luck. Cannot be left out. 4. JADA HAYZE is on debut without trialling for this. Can kick off with a good run. 1. IT'S AWAY gets a chance to improve on an unplaced run at his latest outing at this circuit.

runners.name: JADA HAYZE
runners.comment: Debutant by Jungle Deuce from Dolcetto Hayze. Trained by Sandra Hunt. Watch for any market moves.

runners.name: BYE BRUNETTE
runners.comment: Well bred debutante by Superior Panama from Black Mirage. He looks suitably boxed. Good beginner who will put himself in the race.

runners.name: ASTON SAXON
runners.comment: Good effort last time when second (19.48) over 350m at this track. Prefer others.

runners.name: TICKLE DRAGON
runners.comment: Backs up after finishing 6th on July 5 over 366m at Capalaba in a Maiden. This will test.

runners.name: ELITE CAVIAR
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Maiden on June 29 over 300m at this track behind Enough Torque beaten 2.25 lengths (17.16). Leading contender.

runners.name: IT'S AWAY
runners.comment: Last start finished seventh on June 29 over 300m at this track behind Trustful, beaten 6 lengths (17.27) in a Maiden. Others read better.

runners.name: POISON VOODOO
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time when seventh (21.04) at Capalaba in a Maiden. Will jump from box 7 for the first time. Will need some luck to feature.

ref.race_name: ALL NEWS AT TRACKSIDE.CO.NZ SPRINT PBD

G:CBG:6:2026-07-09.comment: 2. PORTLAND FLEET broke from a low draw and filled a minor placing last start, beaten only 1.3 lengths (18.92) behind Opawa Taz at Manukau. Ready to find winning form. 7. ALTRUISM turned spotting a big start finishing sixth (31.32) last time in a Class 4/5 at Manukau. Solid record here at the distance winning four races. Remains without a win from the draw but has been in the placings three times from six attempts. Great chance to atone. 5. LOVE IT was unfavoured last start but led all the way to score by a neck (21.58) at this track in a Class 3 over 375m. Gets a tricky draw but has the box speed to avoid trouble. Bold showing expected again. 8. GO BELLA is one of the chances after a minor prize from this draw last time. Odds will be appealing.

runners.name: GO BELLA
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (21.72) over 375m at this track. Wide draw here. The recent effort suggests she is a genuine hope.

runners.name: PORTLAND FLEET
runners.comment: In the money last time at Manukau (18.92) in a Class 4, finishing a 1.3 lengths third. Has six wins and 10 placings from 21 starts from the draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

runners.name: ALTRUISM
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (31.32) at Manukau in a Class 4/5, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Looks well placed and should feature.

runners.name: CHAI NOT CHI
runners.comment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by a long neck at this track (21.61) beating Undone in a Class 3 on June 25. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

runners.name: LOVE IT
runners.comment: Scored by a neck last time (21.58) in a Class 3 over 375m at this track. Goes very well from the draw boasting seven victories and 11 places from 35 starts. Has claims if at her best.

runners.name: APRICOT SLICE
runners.comment: Did a good job two starts back at Manukau to win by half a length in 19.05, beating Portland Avatar. Last start finished 6th in a Class 3 on July 2 over 375m at this track behind Love It beaten 5 lengths (21.92). Looks a place chance at best.

runners.name: OPAWA SCARLET
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 318m at Manukau. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

ref.race_name: INDIANA SIRE STAKES 2YO FILLIES PACE MS

H:HOO:11:2026-07-09.comment: 2. KOUNTRY LEGACY scored by 13 metres at Oak Grove Racing over 1609m last start at her first career run. Has the benefit of a good draw. Needs to be at her best to beat this field but she has the ability to mix it with them. 3. OWLEO'S PRIDE made a winning start to her career eight days ago, getting home by 0.8 metres over 1609m at this track. No excuses from this advantageous draw. Steps up a level but she will benefit from that last run and is capable of running another big race. 1. FANTASTECH is a two-year-old filly from the Erv Miller stable on debut. Sure to enjoy an economical run from this draw. Makes plenty of appeal. 6. ALEXIS IT IS is a likely improver after debuting with a solid third last time out over 1609m at this track.

runners.name: MYSTICAL JK
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly facing the starter for the second time. At debut 6th (Fr9) over 1609m at this track beaten 10 m by Owleo's Pride (1:54.10) in ISSE-2FP on June 30 at $13.50. Finds a few better. Can't recommend.

runners.name: FANTASTECH
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly by Jk Endofanera out of Balestra Hanover on debut. Showed ability when she won at Hoosier Park in a trial on June 27 over 1609m. Worth keeping safe.

runners.name: OWLEO'S PRIDE
runners.comment: Won on debut won by a 0.8 m (Fr4) at this track (1:54.10) beating Sassy And Bold in ISSE-2FP on June 30 at $4.60. Key runner once again.

runners.name: KOUNTRY LEGACY
runners.comment: Won on debut won by 13 m as favourite (Fr2) at Oak Grove Racing (1:55.10) beating Shezaloadedbet in KYSS-2F on June 22 at $2.46. In the right form and can score again.

runners.name: ROCKINTHEFREEWORLD
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly lining up for the second time. At debut 4th (Fr3) over 1609m at this track beaten 8 m by Owleo's Pride (1:54.10) in ISSE-2FP on June 30 at $4.20. Won't be beating too many of these home.

runners.name: ALEXIS IT IS
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly facing the starter for the second time. At debut game effort when 3rd (Fr8) over 1609m at this track, beaten 4 m by Owleo's Pride (1:54.10) in ISSE-2FP on June 30 at $4.50. Cannot be left out of calculations.

H:YKS:9:2026-07-09.comment: 5. TAIPAN AS is racing well with eight top-five finishes in succession, the latest effort a second at Scioto Downs over 1609m. Steps up a level but he is good enough to cope. 2. HALFADOZEN is right in the mix after finishing runner-up for the second time in a row last start, beaten 4 metres at this track. Ideally placed to go one better. 1. STARFISH must be respected after scoring last start by 11 metres at Saratoga over 1609m.

runners.name: CREDIT TO FRANK
runners.comment: Last start 6th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track beaten 24 m by Seven Layer (1:56.40) in W5BNMT8 on July 1 at $20.86. Before that, 5th (Fr3) over 1609m at this track beaten 6 m by My Man Peter (1:56.10) in NW7901L5 on June 12 at $5.33. Must be included.

runners.name: HALFADOZEN
runners.comment: Solid performance when a close second behind Bizzy Brenda at this track over 1609m in a W5BNMT7 on June 17 at $43.22. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing second behind Seven Layer at this track over 1609m in a W5BNMT7 on June 24 at $2.54. Has the right credentials to take this out.

runners.name: STARFISH
runners.comment: Has won at her last two outings. Last start posted a big 11 m win as favourite (Fr5) at Saratoga (1:57.20) beating Backswing in NW2PMCD on June 30 at $2.51. Hard to leave out on current form. Sure to give backers a sight.

runners.name: WISH LIST
runners.comment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd (Fr2) over 1609m at this track, beaten 10 m by Seven Layer (1:56.40) in W5BNMT8 on July 1 at $23.63. Strong prospects.

runners.name: TAIPAN AS
runners.comment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Vel Jail Bondsman at Scioto Downs over 1609m in a NW11501L4 on June 12 at $2.90. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second behind Legacy Affair at Scioto Downs over 1609m in a NW11501L4 on June 26 at $19.50. Chief contender.

runners.name: MARIN COUNTY
runners.comment: 4th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track, beaten 6 m by Seven Layer (1:56.30) in W5BNMT7 on June 24 at $24.93. Before that 4th (Fr1) over 1609m at this track, beaten 12 m by Khaosan Road (1:56.40) in NW12446L5 on June 12 at $16.56. Others read better. This will test.

runners.name: BIZZY BRENDA
runners.comment: Last start 6th (Fr8) over 1609m at this track beaten 9 m by Seven Layer (1:56.30) in W5BNMT7 on June 24 at $52.67. Two runs back won by a 0.9 m (Fr3) at this track (1:59.10) beating Halfadozen in W5BNMT7 on June 17 at $5.69. Looks outclassed.

runners.name: HL OLMAYA
runners.comment: Didn't do much at the last run, 8th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track beaten 15 m by Seven Layer (1:56.30) in W5BNMT7 on June 24 at $48.25. Before that 5th (Fr4) over 1609m at this track beaten 40 m by Minoan (1:55.30) in W2BNMT4 on June 17 at $24.74. Needs an easier race.

G:SHE:6:2026-07-09.comment: 8. UTAH ICON was below best at his last couple, the latest finishing fifth at this track, but was among the placings at this track three back. Can make amends this time. 4. NEW SHERIFF produced a moderate effort last time when eighth at Bendigo over 425m behind Paw Oppa (24.82) in a Grade 5. Goes very well from this draw with two wins and two minor placings from four starts. Leading chance. 5. KRAKEN CHIEF boasts a strong record this course with six wins and two minors from 16 tries. Missed the frame latest (26.20) when fifth over 450m at this track in a Grade 5. Can feature with the right run.

runners.name: LOLLY CAKE
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (26.01) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 2.25 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Among the chances on best.

runners.name: KRAKEN CHIEF
runners.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 5th in a Grade 5 on July 2 over 450m at this track behind Paw Eden beaten 2.5 lengths (26.20). Placed two back at Bendigo. Key chance on best form.

runners.name: UTAH ICON
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 5th over 450m at this track beaten 4 lengths (25.70) behind Paw Estrella in a Grade 5 on June 29. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

runners.name: CINDY CABANG
runners.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on July 3 over 300m at Healesville in a Grade 5. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

runners.name: NEW SHERIFF
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (24.82) at Bendigo in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 7 lengths. Box stats strong with two wins and two placings from four starts. Has ability and should feature.

runners.name: ELSA JAY
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 425m at Bendigo. Likely to struggle this time.

runners.name: AUNTIE AMBER
runners.comment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished fourth on July 6 over 650m at this track behind Midnight Phantom, beaten 8 lengths (37.72) in a Special conditions race. Has the ability to be in the finish.

runners.name: LEAVE ME IN
runners.comment: At the last start finished 6th over 500m at Bendigo beaten 5 lengths (29.05) behind Aussie Raven in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 on July 1. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

ref.race_name: WAIKATO FOXBRIDGE PLATE 22 AUG @ TE RAPA

R:CBG:5:2026-07-09.comment: 2. EL SPEEDY MAN did not get into the race at Te Rapa nearly 4 weeks ago after starting his career with a brace of second-place finishes on this track. Stepping up from 1400m to 2000m will do him no harm, and in a modest field, we have him on top. 1. BEAU MILLER was a touch one-paced last start, and he is trained on this course, which should help when making his poly track debut. A form reversal is on the cards. 6. RIPPIN ALONG improved from an average fresh-up performance at Whanganui to finish a solid fourth here last time out over 1550m. She will relish the extra 450m, and she is a top 3 chance this time. 5. IRISH FLUTE led and was only run down late at Matamata last start over 1600m, and she will take plenty of pegging back over a middle distance. Stick with her on an each-way basis. 3. LASER BEAM has been showing pace and then fading in his last couple of starts, and from the pole position, he could sit just off the pace this time. Include in all top 4 combos.

runners.name: IRISH FLUTE
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 10 at Hastings on May 21 over 1400m, in the wet; 10 len behind Sundown Sav carrying 55.5kg at $7.90. Last start 4th of 10 at Matamata on June 14 over 1600m, slow going 2.25 len behind Pre Nup carrying 57.5kg at $10.70. Will be harder to beat this time.

runners.name: EL SPEEDY MAN
runners.comment: Last start 11th of 13 at Te Rapa on June 13 over 1400m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Pure Lotus carrying 58.5kg at $10.70. Before that 2nd of 11 at this track on June 3 over 1550m, 0.9 len behind In Your Dreams carrying 58.5kg at $8.50. Great chance to break through.

runners.name: RIPPIN ALONG
runners.comment: Third-up today. First-up 8th of 12 at Wanganui on May 30 over 1340m, slow going 9 len behind Sworn with 54.5kg at $34.60. Last start 4th of 12 at this track on June 17 over 1550m, 2.5 len behind Fortune Asia carrying 54.5kg at $11.90. Well placed. Can turn things around.

runners.name: LASER BEAM
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 4th of 8 at Awapuni Synthetic on July 3 over 2140m, 3 len behind Street Appeal with 57.5kg at $2.90. The race before that 4th of 10 at this track on June 17 over 2000m, 1.2 len behind Allthekingshorses carrying 57.5kg at $11.90. Better thRates among the top 4 chances.

runners.name: REALTA FORSAI
runners.comment: Raced two times to date. At big odds at debut, 4th of 11 at this track on May 20 over 1300m, 3 len behind Proud Capitalist with 58.5kg at $27.20. Second-up 7th of 11 at this track on June 3 over 1550m, 8 len behind In Your Dreams carrying 58.5kg at $10.80. Well placed here and can feature in the finish.

runners.name: LINIOUS
runners.comment: Last start eased back early on 7th of 12 at this track on June 17 over 1550m, 5.5 len behind Fortune Asia with 56.5kg at $60.70. The run before that 10th of 14 at Te Aroha on June 4 over 1600m, on heavy track; 8 len behind Final Reason carrying 56.5kg at $37.40. Unlikely to threaten.

runners.name: BEAU MILLER

Stepping up from 1400m to 2000m will do him no harm, and in a modest field, we have him on top. 1. BEAU MILLER was a touch one-paced last start, and he is trained on this course, which should help when making his poly track debut. A form reversal is on the cards. 6. RIPPIN ALONG improved from an average fresh-up performance at Whanganui to finish a solid fourth here last time out over 1550m. She will relish the extra 450m, and she is a top 3 chance this time. 5. IRISH FLUTE led and was only run down late at Matamata last start over 1600m, and she will take plenty of pegging back over a middle distance. Stick with her on an each-way basis. 3. LASER BEAM has been showing pace and then fading in his last couple of starts, and from the pole position, he could sit just off the pace this time. Include in all top 4 combos.

LASER BEAM has been showing pace and then fading in his last couple of starts, and from the pole position, he could sit just off the pace this time. Include in all top 4 combos.

runners.comment: Latest effort finished 5th over 450m at this track beaten 4 lengths (25.70) behind Paw Estrella in a Grade 5 on June 29. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

runners.name: CINDY CABANG
runners.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on July 3 over 300m at Healesville in a Grade 5. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

runners.name: NEW SHERIFF
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (24.82) at Bendigo in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 7 lengths. Box stats strong with two wins and two placings from four starts. Has ability and should feature.

runners.name: ELSA JAY
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 425m at Bendigo. Likely to struggle this time.

runners.name: AUNTIE AMBER
runners.comment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished fourth on July 6 over 650m at this track behind Midnight Phantom, beaten 8 lengths (37.72) in a Special conditions race. Has the ability to be in the finish.

runners.comment: At the last start finished 6th over 500m at Bendigo beaten 5 lengths (29.05) behind Aussie Raven in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 on July 1. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

R:CBG:5:2026-07-09.comment: 2. EL SPEEDY MAN did not get into the race at Te Rapa nearly 4 weeks ago after starting his career with a brace of second-place finishes on this track. Stepping up from 1400m to 2000m will do him no harm, and in a modest field, we have him on top. 1. BEAU MILLER was a touch one-paced last start, and he is trained on this course, which should help when making his poly track debut. A form reversal is on the cards. 6. RIPPIN ALONG improved from an average fresh-up performance at Whanganui to finish a solid fourth here last time out over 1550m. She will relish the extra 450m, and she is a top 3 chance this time. 5. IRISH FLUTE led and was only run down late at Matamata last start over 1600m, and she will take plenty of pegging back over a middle distance. Stick with her on an each-way basis. 3. LASER BEAM has been showing pace and then fading in his last couple of starts, and from the pole position, he could sit just off the pace this time. Include in all top 4 combos.

runners.name: IRISH FLUTE
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 10 at Hastings on May 21 over 1400m, in the wet; 10 len behind Sundown Sav carrying 55.5kg at $7.90. Last start 4th of 10 at Matamata on June 14 over 1600m, slow going 2.25 len behind Pre Nup carrying 57.5kg at $10.70. Will be harder to beat this time.

runners.name: EL SPEEDY MAN
runners.comment: Last start 11th of 13 at Te Rapa on June 13 over 1400m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Pure Lotus carrying 58.5kg at $10.70. Before that 2nd of 11 at this track on June 3 over 1550m, 0.9 len behind In Your Dreams carrying 58.5kg at $8.50. Great chance to break through.

runners.name: RIPPIN ALONG
runners.comment: Third-up today. First-up 8th of 12 at Wanganui on May 30 over 1340m, slow going 9 len behind Sworn with 54.5kg at $34.60. Last start 4th of 12 at this track on June 17 over 1550m, 2.5 len behind Fortune Asia carrying 54.5kg at $11.90. Well placed. Can turn things around.

runners.name: LASER BEAM
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 4th of 8 at Awapuni Synthetic on July 3 over 2140m, 3 len behind Street Appeal with 57.5kg at $2.90. The race before that 4th of 10 at this track on June 17 over 2000m, 1.2 len behind Allthekingshorses carrying 57.5kg at $11.90. Better thRates among the top 4 chances.

runners.name: REALTA FORSAI
runners.comment: Raced two times to date. At big odds at debut, 4th of 11 at this track on May 20 over 1300m, 3 len behind Proud Capitalist with 58.5kg at $27.20. Second-up 7th of 11 at this track on June 3 over 1550m, 8 len behind In Your Dreams carrying 58.5kg at $10.80. Well placed here and can feature in the finish.

runners.name: LINIOUS
runners.comment: Last start eased back early on 7th of 12 at this track on June 17 over 1550m, 5.5 len behind Fortune Asia with 56.5kg at $60.70. The run before that 10th of 14 at Te Aroha on June 4 over 1600m, on heavy track; 8 len behind Final Reason carrying 56.5kg at $37.40. Unlikely to threaten.

runners.name: BEAU MILLER
runners.comment: Most recently raced on the pace before fading 8th of 14 at Te Aroha on June 21 over 2200m, on a wet track; 14 len behind Mobilized with 56.5kg at $7.50. Before that 4th of 14 at Te Aroha on June 4 over 1600m, on a wet track; 4 len behind Aixoise with 56.5kg at $11.30. Is capable on his day and is not out of it.

runners.name: EFFIE GOODACRE
runners.comment: Most recently 6th of 12 at this track on June 17 over 1550m, 4 len behind Fortune Asia carrying 54.5kg at $115.20. Before that didn't finish the race at this track June 3 over 1550m. Hard to get excited about.

runners.comment: Last start won by 4.5 m as favourite (Fr3) at this track (1:56.20) beating Crystal Coast in FMW2BNM4PM on June 24 at $1.96. Sure to be thereabouts.

Likely improver with strong prospects. 6. IN VRONSKY STYLE doesn't win very often but ran a strong race last time out over 1207m at this track, finishing second and beaten 2 lengths after being prominent at the turn. Likely improver with strong prospects. 7. MAIN DUDE stuck on well last start to finish third over 1207m at this track after showing good early speed. This is a nice race and can get the job done. 3. BRINSON missed the placings two runs back then didn't do any better last start when 12 lengths away in seventh over 1207m at this track. Has his share of talent and is a top-three prospect.

The run before that 5th of 7 at this track on June 1 over 1006m, 6 len behind Finding Ways carrying 55.5kg at $30. Nice effort last time. Can go on with the job now.

runners.name: HE LIKES WINNING
runners.comment: Most recently ran last of 7 at this track on June 24 over 1207m, 15 len behind Aaron's Spirit carrying 55.5kg at $5.80. The run before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 8 at this track on June 3 over 1106m, 2.75 len behind Flying Tex with 55.5kg at $3.90. Safely held last start but is capable of better.

runners.name: CONSPIRACYTHEORIST

Second run from a spell 4th of 7 at this track on June 24 over 1207m, 6 len behind Aaron's Spirit carrying 55.5kg at $44.35. Might just find this a bit too tough.

runners.name: BRINSON
runners.comment: Most recently ran last of 7 at this track on July 1 over 1207m, 12 len behind Makena's Joy with 53.5kg at $25.75. Before that 5th of 9 at this track on June 17 over 1207m, 4 len behind Call The Cavalry carrying 55.5kg at $34. Has shown enough ability in the past to take this out.

runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (22.93) over 390m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Looking to others.

runners.comment: Showed brilliant pace early and gave a sight when a 4.5 lengths third over 390m this track in 22.44. More than capable and ready to find best form.

runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 390m at this track. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

runners.comment: Two-year-old filly (Catch The Fire - Libspeak) making her debut. Finished fifth in a trial on June 18 at Northfield Park over 1609m. Might be better for this outing

runners.name: GOLD CRUSH
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly by Summa Cum Laude out of Major Crush on debut. Might be better for this outing

runners.comment: Two-year-old filly by Lather Up out of Private Performanc having her first start. Finished seventh in a trial on June 29 at Scioto Downs over 1609m. Respect any move in betting.

runners.name: DROP POCKET
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly (Monte Miki - Corner Pocket) making her debut. Finished third at Scioto Downs in a trial on June 29 over 1609m. Respect any move in betting.

runners.name: ASTON SAXON
runners.comment: Good effort last time when second (19.48) over 350m at this track. Prefer others.

LOVE IT was unfavoured last start but led all the way to score by a neck (21.58) at this track in a Class 3 over 375m. Gets a tricky draw but has the box speed to avoid trouble. Bold showing expected again. 8. GO BELLA is one of the chances after a minor prize from this draw last time. Odds will be appealing.

runners.name: GO BELLA
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (21.72) over 375m at this track. Wide draw here. The recent effort suggests she is a genuine hope.

runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (31.32) at Manukau in a Class 4/5, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Looks well placed and should feature.

BEAU MILLER was a touch one-paced last start, and he is trained on this course, which should help when making his poly track debut. A form reversal is on the cards. 6. RIPPIN ALONG improved from an average fresh-up performance at Whanganui to finish a solid fourth here last time out over 1550m. She will relish the extra 450m, and she is a top 3 chance this time. 5. IRISH FLUTE led and was only run down late at Matamata last start over 1600m, and she will take plenty of pegging back over a middle distance. Stick with her on an each-way basis. 3. LASER BEAM has been showing pace and then fading in his last couple of starts, and from the pole position, he could sit just off the pace this time. Include in all top 4 combos.

runners.comment: Two-year-old filly lining up for the second time. At debut 4th (Fr3) over 1609m at this track beaten 8 m by Owleo's Pride (1:54.10) in ISSE-2FP on June 30 at $4.20. Won't be beating too many of these home.

runners.name: ALEXIS IT IS
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly facing the starter for the second time. At debut game effort when 3rd (Fr8) over 1609m at this track, beaten 4 m by Owleo's Pride (1:54.10) in ISSE-2FP on June 30 at $4.50. Cannot be left out of calculations.

H:YKS:9:2026-07-09.comment: 5. TAIPAN AS is racing well with eight top-five finishes in succession, the latest effort a second at Scioto Downs over 1609m. Steps up a level but he is good enough to cope. 2. HALFADOZEN is right in the mix after finishing runner-up for the second time in a row last start, beaten 4 metres at this track. Ideally placed to go one better. 1. STARFISH must be respected after scoring last start by 11 metres at Saratoga over 1609m.

runners.name: CREDIT TO FRANK
runners.comment: Last start 6th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track beaten 24 m by Seven Layer (1:56.40) in W5BNMT8 on July 1 at $20.86. Before that, 5th (Fr3) over 1609m at this track beaten 6 m by My Man Peter (1:56.10) in NW7901L5 on June 12 at $5.33. Must be included.

runners.name: HALFADOZEN
runners.comment: Solid performance when a close second behind Bizzy Brenda at this track over 1609m in a W5BNMT7 on June 17 at $43.22. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing second behind Seven Layer at this track over 1609m in a W5BNMT7 on June 24 at $2.54. Has the right credentials to take this out.

runners.name: STARFISH
runners.comment: Has won at her last two outings. Last start posted a big 11 m win as favourite (Fr5) at Saratoga (1:57.20) beating Backswing in NW2PMCD on June 30 at $2.51. Hard to leave out on current form. Sure to give backers a sight.

runners.name: WISH LIST
runners.comment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd (Fr2) over 1609m at this track, beaten 10 m by Seven Layer (1:56.40) in W5BNMT8 on July 1 at $23.63. Strong prospects.

runners.name: TAIPAN AS
runners.comment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Vel Jail Bondsman at Scioto Downs over 1609m in a NW11501L4 on June 12 at $2.90. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second behind Legacy Affair at Scioto Downs over 1609m in a NW11501L4 on June 26 at $19.50. Chief contender.

runners.name: MARIN COUNTY
runners.comment: 4th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track, beaten 6 m by Seven Layer (1:56.30) in W5BNMT7 on June 24 at $24.93. Before that 4th (Fr1) over 1609m at this track, beaten 12 m by Khaosan Road (1:56.40) in NW12446L5 on June 12 at $16.56. Others read better. This will test.

runners.name: BIZZY BRENDA
runners.comment: Last start 6th (Fr8) over 1609m at this track beaten 9 m by Seven Layer (1:56.30) in W5BNMT7 on June 24 at $52.67. Two runs back won by a 0.9 m (Fr3) at this track (1:59.10) beating Halfadozen in W5BNMT7 on June 17 at $5.69. Looks outclassed.

runners.name: HL OLMAYA
runners.comment: Didn't do much at the last run, 8th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track beaten 15 m by Seven Layer (1:56.30) in W5BNMT7 on June 24 at $48.25. Before that 5th (Fr4) over 1609m at this track beaten 40 m by Minoan (1:55.30) in W2BNMT4 on June 17 at $24.74. Needs an easier race.

G:SHE:6:2026-07-09.comment: 8. UTAH ICON was below best at his last couple, the latest finishing fifth at this track, but was among the placings at this track three back. Can make amends this time. 4. NEW SHERIFF produced a moderate effort last time when eighth at Bendigo over 425m behind Paw Oppa (24.82) in a Grade 5. Goes very well from this draw with two wins and two minor placings from four starts. Leading chance. 5. KRAKEN CHIEF boasts a strong record this course with six wins and two minors from 16 tries. Missed the frame latest (26.20) when fifth over 450m at this track in a Grade 5. Can feature with the right run.

runners.name: LOLLY CAKE
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (26.01) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 2.25 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Among the chances on best.

runners.name: KRAKEN CHIEF
runners.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 5th in a Grade 5 on July 2 over 450m at this track behind Paw Eden beaten 2.5 lengths (26.20). Placed two back at Bendigo. Key chance on best form.

runners.name: UTAH ICON
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 5th over 450m at this track beaten 4 lengths (25.70) behind Paw Estrella in a Grade 5 on June 29. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

runners.name: CINDY CABANG
runners.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on July 3 over 300m at Healesville in a Grade 5. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

runners.name: NEW SHERIFF
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (24.82) at Bendigo in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 7 lengths. Box stats strong with two wins and two placings from four starts. Has ability and should feature.

runners.name: ELSA JAY
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 425m at Bendigo. Likely to struggle this time.

runners.name: AUNTIE AMBER
runners.comment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished fourth on July 6 over 650m at this track behind Midnight Phantom, beaten 8 lengths (37.72) in a Special conditions race. Has the ability to be in the finish.

runners.name: LEAVE ME IN
runners.comment: At the last start finished 6th over 500m at Bendigo beaten 5 lengths (29.05) behind Aussie Raven in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 on July 1. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

ref.race_name: WAIKATO FOXBRIDGE PLATE 22 AUG @ TE RAPA

R:CBG:5:2026-07-09.comment: 2. EL SPEEDY MAN did not get into the race at Te Rapa nearly 4 weeks ago after starting his career with a brace of second-place finishes on this track. Stepping up from 1400m to 2000m will do him no harm, and in a modest field, we have him on top. 1. BEAU MILLER was a touch one-paced last start, and he is trained on this course, which should help when making his poly track debut. A form reversal is on the cards. 6. RIPPIN ALONG improved from an average fresh-up performance at Whanganui to finish a solid fourth here last time out over 1550m. She will relish the extra 450m, and she is a top 3 chance this time. 5. IRISH FLUTE led and was only run down late at Matamata last start over 1600m, and she will take plenty of pegging back over a middle distance. Stick with her on an each-way basis. 3. LASER BEAM has been showing pace and then fading in his last couple of starts, and from the pole position, he could sit just off the pace this time. Include in all top 4 combos.

runners.name: IRISH FLUTE
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 10 at Hastings on May 21 over 1400m, in the wet; 10 len behind Sundown Sav carrying 55.5kg at $7.90. Last start 4th of 10 at Matamata on June 14 over 1600m, slow going 2.25 len behind Pre Nup carrying 57.5kg at $10.70. Will be harder to beat this time.

runners.name: EL SPEEDY MAN
runners.comment: Last start 11th of 13 at Te Rapa on June 13 over 1400m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Pure Lotus carrying 58.5kg at $10.70. Before that 2nd of 11 at this track on June 3 over 1550m, 0.9 len behind In Your Dreams carrying 58.5kg at $8.50. Great chance to break through.

runners.name: RIPPIN ALONG
runners.comment: Third-up today. First-up 8th of 12 at Wanganui on May 30 over 1340m, slow going 9 len behind Sworn with 54.5kg at $34.60. Last start 4th of 12 at this track on June 17 over 1550m, 2.5 len behind Fortune Asia carrying 54.5kg at $11.90. Well placed. Can turn things around.

runners.name: LASER BEAM
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 4th of 8 at Awapuni Synthetic on July 3 over 2140m, 3 len behind Street Appeal with 57.5kg at $2.90. The race before that 4th of 10 at this track on June 17 over 2000m, 1.2 len behind Allthekingshorses carrying 57.5kg at $11.90. Better thRates among the top 4 chances.

runners.name: REALTA FORSAI
runners.comment: Raced two times to date. At big odds at debut, 4th of 11 at this track on May 20 over 1300m, 3 len behind Proud Capitalist with 58.5kg at $27.20. Second-up 7th of 11 at this track on June 3 over 1550m, 8 len behind In Your Dreams carrying 58.5kg at $10.80. Well placed here and can feature in the finish.

runners.name: LINIOUS
runners.comment: Last start eased back early on 7th of 12 at this track on June 17 over 1550m, 5.5 len behind Fortune Asia with 56.5kg at $60.70. The run before that 10th of 14 at Te Aroha on June 4 over 1600m, on heavy track; 8 len behind Final Reason carrying 56.5kg at $37.40. Unlikely to threaten.

runners.name: BEAU MILLER
runners.comment: Most recently raced on the pace before fading 8th of 14 at Te Aroha on June 21 over 2200m, on a wet track; 14 len behind Mobilized with 56.5kg at $7.50. Before that 4th of 14 at Te Aroha on June 4 over 1600m, on a wet track; 4 len behind Aixoise with 56.5kg at $11.30. Is capable on his day and is not out of it.

runners.name: EFFIE GOODACRE
runners.comment: Most recently 6th of 12 at this track on June 17 over 1550m, 4 len behind Fortune Asia carrying 54.5kg at $115.20. Before that didn't finish the race at this track June 3 over 1550m. Hard to get excited about.

R:ABO:4:2026-07-09.comment: 7. LA GATA SALVAJE built on a nice third two starts back at this track with success over 1106m at this track three weeks ago, getting home by 1.75 lengths. Javaniel R Patterson scored on her last time and retains the mount. Likely to be in the finish again. 5. LOW EURO CAT showed good pace and went on to score by half a length last time out over 1207m at Horsemen's Park (Dirt). Finds a tougher race but a win is not out of the question. 4. REGAL RUMOR returned from a spell three weeks ago when she was beaten 2.25 lengths into fifth over 1106m at this track. Fitter so anticipating a better run this time. 6. INDYETTA was in the firing line on the bend and finished second last time over 1106m at this track, beaten 1.75 lengths. Will trim down following recent racing. Suitably placed so anticipating another strong effort.

runners.name: THORN CROWN
runners.comment: Most recently 4th of 7 at this track on June 10 over 1006m, 8 len behind Queen Of Attitude with 56kg at $6.45. The start before that ran on from midfield and won by 1.0 len at this track May 19 over 1006m defeating Wings Of A Sparrow carrying 56kg at $3.70. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

runners.name: HARDLY MISCHIEVOUS
runners.comment: Most recently ran second last in a small field at this track on June 24 over 1408m, 4.5 len behind Get My Drift with 52.5kg at $25.50. The start before that 2nd in a small field at this track on June 2 over 1408m, on a wet track; 3 len behind Get My Drift carrying 56kg at $4.85. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

runners.name: REGAL RUMOR
runners.comment: Second-up. First-up after three months 5th of 7 at this track on June 17 over 1106m, 2.25 len behind La Gata Salvaje carrying 56kg at $3. Previously second-up 5th of 9 at Fonner Park in LR on February 28 over 805m, 5 len behind Hurricane Lassie with 56.5kg at $9.30. Strong winning chance.

runners.name: LOW EURO CAT
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Most recently came from midfield and won by 0.5 len at Horsemen's Park June 27 over 1207m defeating Springtime Moon with 56.5kg at $3.40. The run before that 3rd in a small field at Legacy Downs on June 7 over 1106m, 3 len behind Baby Kristen carrying 56.5kg at $2.70. Big chance to go back-to-back.

runners.name: JUST THE THING
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run won by 0.5 len at this track June 17 over 1106m defeating Peterson Landing with 56kg at $4.30. The run before that 3rd in a small field at this track on June 3 over 1207m, 2.5 len behind She's My Niece carrying 56kg at $10.15. Last-start winner worth including

runners.name: INDYETTA
runners.comment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 7 at this track on May 26 over 1006m, 2.75 len behind Payton's Indian carrying 55kg at $4.30. Second-up 2nd of 7 at this track on June 17 over 1106m, 1.75 len behind La Gata Salvaje carrying 55kg at $9.65. Wasn?t too far off the mark last time. In the mix again.

runners.name: LA GATA SALVAJE
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. Most recently ran on from midfield and won by 1.75 len at this track June 17 over 1106m defeating Indyetta with 56kg at $4.30. The start before that 3rd in a small field at this track on May 27 over 1106m, 4 len behind Mystic Song carrying 55kg at $1.50. Hard to beat again.
